steps.title: Infer the needed trait
steps.content: The examples show black swan family structures adapting in different ways: successful pairs foster cygnets, and male-male pairs can rear cygnets successfully. The blank needs a word for flexible functioning across forms.

steps.title: Select the flexible term
steps.content: Elasticity fits the ability to adapt while functioning. A suggests unity, C suggests emotional fondness, and D requires mutual exchange, which the passage does not establish. The answer is B.
